title: Cold Jellyfish Salad

seo.title: How to Make Cold Jellyfish Salad — Easy Chinese Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Cold Jellyfish Salad. This easy Chinese recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.
longTailKeywords: how to make Cold Jellyfish Salad
h2Headings: Pro Tips for the Best Results
seo.imageAlt: Authentic Chinese Cold Jellyfish Salad recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Cold Jellyfish Salad — a beloved Chinese classic

description: Cold Jellyfish Salad is a refreshing and popular Chinese appetizer, celebrated for its unique chewy texture and vibrant, tangy flavor. This classic dish offers a delightful balance of savory notes with a hint of sweetness and a satisfying crunch from fresh vegetables. It makes an invigorating start to any traditional Chinese meal.

instructions.title: Prepare the Jellyfish
instructions.text: If using dried jellyfish, rehydrate according to package instructions, typically by soaking in cold water for several hours or overnight, then rinsing thoroughly. If using pre-packaged prepared jellyfish, rinse it well under cold running water to remove excess brine. Blanch the jellyfish in boiling water for 30 seconds, then immediately drain and plunge into ice water to stop cooking and maintain its crisp texture. Drain completely and pat dry.

instructions.title: Prepare Vegetables and Aromatics
instructions.text: Wash the cucumber and julienne it into thin, matchstick-sized strips. Peel and finely mince the garlic cloves. Set aside.

instructions.title: Make the Dressing
instructions.text: In a small bowl, combine the light soy sauce, Chinese black vinegar, sesame oil, and granulated sugar. Whisk until the sugar is fully dissolved. If using, stir in the chili oil. Add the minced garlic to the dressing.

instructions.title: Combine Ingredients
instructions.text: In a large mixing bowl, add the prepared jellyfish and the julienned cucumber. Pour the dressing evenly over the jellyfish and cucumber.

instructions.title: Toss and Chill
instructions.text: Gently toss all the ingredients together until the jellyfish and cucumber are well coated with the dressing. Ensure everything is thoroughly mixed. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 15-20 minutes to allow the flavors to meld and the salad to chill.

instructions.title: Serve and Garnish
instructions.text: Before serving, give the salad another gentle toss. Transfer the Cold Jellyfish Salad to a serving dish. Garnish with freshly chopped cilantro.

tips: For the best texture, always blanch jellyfish briefly and then immediately shock it in ice water. Overcooking will make it rubbery, and skipping the ice bath will make it less crisp.
Adjust the balance of soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar to your personal preference. A dash of MSG can enhance the umami flavor if desired, but is optional.
This salad tastes best when chilled for at least 15-20 minutes before serving, allowing the flavors to fully develop. It can be prepared a few hours in advance.
article: Cold Jellyfish Salad is a beloved Chinese Appetizers dish enjoyed across Chinese. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
